title: phaius flavus
intro: Phaius flavus, also known as the Yellow Formosa, is a terrestrial orchid species native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. The plant is known to possess medicinal properties, particularly its rhizome, which has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Phaius flavus include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, skin infections, and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the rhizome of Phaius flavus is often dried and powdered, then used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
